edges.subject: nvidia/NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Super-120B-A12B-BF16
edges.description: Nemotron-Math-v2 (~347K problems, ~7M reasoning trajectories sampled across six reasoning/tool configurations) is SFT training data for the Nemotron-3-Super-120B BF16 master chat.

evidence.excerpt: Nemotron-Math-v2 is a large-scale mathematical reasoning dataset containing approximately 347K high-quality mathematical problems and 7M model-generated reasoning trajectories.
evidence.explanation: Defines the dataset that feeds Nemotron-3-Super SFT.

evidence.excerpt: The problems are sourced from nvidia/Nemotron-Math-v2, which extracted and filtered problems from: AoPS Subset ... StackExchange-Math Subset
evidence.explanation: Establishes Nemotron-Math-v2 as the upstream problem source.

evidence.excerpt: made by translating a subsample of SFT data from Nemotron-Math-v2, Nemotron-Competitive-Programming-v1, and Nemotron-Science-v1 into to 6 languages
evidence.explanation: Identifies Nemotron-Math-v2 as upstream math source.

edges.subject: nvidia/NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Super-120B-A12B-BF16
edges.description: gpt-oss-120b generated all ~7M reasoning trajectories in Nemotron-Math-v2 under six configurations (high/medium/low reasoning x with/without Python TIR), 8 samples per configuration; these traces are the supervision signal for SFT of the Nemotron-3-Super-120B BF16 chat.

evidence.excerpt: Each problem is solved multiple times by the gpt-oss-120b model under six settings (high/medium/low reasoning x with/without Python TIR).
evidence.explanation: Identifies gpt-oss-120b as the synthetic-data generator whose outputs train the Nemotron chat.

evidence.excerpt: The natural language theorems were put into an autoformalization pipeline powered by gpt-oss-120b to obtain formalized statements in Lean.
evidence.explanation: Establishes gpt-oss-120b as the autoformalization generator.

evidence.excerpt: This subset is an improvement of the STEM subset in Nemotron-Post-Training-Dataset-v1 with reasoning traces generated with GPT-OSS-120B.
evidence.explanation: Establishes GPT-OSS-120B as the synthetic data generator.

evidence.excerpt: We refreshed the Chat subset from nvidia/Nemotron-Post-Training-Dataset-v2 using GPT-OSS-120B, Qwen3-235B-A22B-Thinking-2507, and Qwen3-235B-A22B-Instruct-2507.

evidence.excerpt: the questions and agent skills are synthetically generated using the GPT OSS 120B model
evidence.explanation: Confirms GPT-OSS-120B as the question/skills generator.

evidence.excerpt: synthetic dialogues generated from Kimi-K2-Thinking, GLM-4.6, Qwen3-235B-A22B-Thinking-2507, GPT-OSS-120b, Kimi-K2-Instruct-0905, and Qwen3-235B-A22B-Instruct-2507.
evidence.explanation: Names GPT-OSS-120B as a synthetic dialogue generator.

evidence.excerpt: The question-answer pairs were synthetically generated using template-based SDG methodology powered by large language models (GPT-OSS-120B for answer generation).
